summary.scope: A dedicated web page designed to attract and capture leads for real estate purposes, acting as a focused entry point for marketing campaigns.

modules.name: Landing Page Content
modules.purpose: To display all static and dynamic content elements that convey the value proposition and branding to the visitor.

features.name: Display Compelling Headline
features.description: Present a clear, concise, and compelling headline on the landing page.

userStories.title: Display Headline
userStories.story: As a Website Visitor, I want to see a compelling headline, so that I immediately understand the page's purpose and benefit.
acceptanceCriteria: The headline is prominently displayed at the top of the page.
The headline is concise and clear.
The headline communicates the main offer or benefit.

features.name: Display High-Quality Visuals
features.description: Show high-quality photography or video to engage visitors.

userStories.title: View Visuals
userStories.story: As a Website Visitor, I want to see high-quality images or videos, so that I am visually engaged and learn more about properties or services.
acceptanceCriteria: The landing page displays at least one high-quality visual.
Visuals are relevant to real estate (properties, agents, area).
Visuals load efficiently.

features.name: Display Value Proposition
features.description: Clearly explain the benefits of engaging with the page.

userStories.title: Understand Value Proposition
userStories.story: As a Website Visitor, I want to understand what I will gain, so that I am motivated to take the desired action.
acceptanceCriteria: A clear value proposition or benefit statement is displayed.
The statement explains the user's gain (e.g., 'Find Your Dream Home').

features.name: Display Agent/Company Information
features.description: Show contact details, branding, and an introduction to the agent or agency.

userStories.title: View Agent/Company Details
userStories.story: As a Website Visitor, I want to see agent or company information, so that I can establish trust and know who to contact.
acceptanceCriteria: Agent/company name is displayed.
Contact information (e.g., phone, email) is visible.
Branding elements (e.g., logo) are present.
A brief introduction or bio is displayed.

modules.name: Lead Capture
modules.purpose: To enable visitors to submit their contact information through a form and provide submission confirmation.

features.name: Lead Capture Form
features.description: Provide a form for users to submit their information (name, email, phone number) and include a clear call to action.

userStories.title: Submit Lead Information
userStories.story: As a Website Visitor, I want to fill out and submit my contact information, so that I can receive the offered value (e.g., property details, valuation).
acceptanceCriteria: A form is present on the page for collecting name, email, and phone number.
The form clearly indicates required fields.
A prominent Call to Action (CTA) button is available to submit the form.
All required fields are validated before submission (BR001).
The form prevents submission with invalid or missing required data.

features.name: Submission Confirmation
features.description: Display a confirmation message to the user after successful form submission.

userStories.title: Receive Submission Confirmation
userStories.story: As a Website Visitor, I want to see a confirmation message after submitting my information, so that I know my submission was successful.
acceptanceCriteria: A confirmation message is displayed immediately after a successful form submission.
The confirmation message is clear and informs the user of success.

modules.name: Lead Forwarding
modules.purpose: To transmit captured lead information to a designated recipient or system for follow-up.

features.name: Lead Data Transmission
features.description: Forward collected lead information to a designated recipient or system (e.g., CRM, email) upon successful submission.

userStories.title: Forward Lead to Agent
userStories.story: As an Agent/Administrator, I want to receive lead information promptly after a visitor submits the form, so that I can follow up with potential clients.
acceptanceCriteria: Upon successful form submission, the collected lead data (Name, Email, Phone Number, Submission Timestamp, and potentially Inquiry Type) is forwarded.
The lead data is sent to a pre-configured recipient or system (e.g., email address, CRM).
The forwarded information includes all required fields as validated by BR001.

milestones.name: Foundational Landing Page
milestones.goal: Deliver a basic, functional landing page capable of displaying core content and capturing leads.
completionCriteria: All content display features are implemented and visible.
Lead capture form is functional and validates input.
Submission confirmation is displayed to the user.

milestones.name: Lead Integration
milestones.goal: Ensure captured leads are successfully forwarded for agent follow-up.
completionCriteria: Lead data is successfully transmitted to the designated recipient/system.
Compliance with Fair Housing Act and Truth in Advertising for all content.

phases.name: Foundation
phases.description: Establish the core visual and interactive components of the landing page.

phases.name: Core Features
phases.description: Implement the essential lead generation and integration functionalities.

risks.description: Incomplete requirements due to unresolved blocking questions (Target Audience, Property Information Source, Primary CTA, Geographic Focus).
risks.mitigation: Engage stakeholders to answer Q001, Q002, Q003, Q004 to finalize scope and potential advanced features. Planning for these features is currently blocked.

risks.description: Compliance with Fair Housing Act and Truth in Advertising regulations.
risks.mitigation: Ensure all content (text, images, claims) is reviewed by legal counsel or a compliance expert before deployment. Incorporate clear guidelines for content creation.

risks.description: Integration complexity with external CRM/Email Marketing system.
risks.mitigation: Clearly define integration points and data formats with the external system. Select a robust and well-documented integration method. Conduct thorough testing.

blockers: Q001: Target Audience and Goal - This impacts content focus and specific CTAs.
Q002: Property Information Source - This determines if property display/search features (and related integrations) are needed.
Q003: Primary Call to Action (CTA) - This is critical for the lead capture form design and messaging.
Q004: Geographic Focus - This affects localized content and potential property display relevance.
